name: property managers handling 5–15 rental properties tool
description: For property managers handling 5–15 rental properties, inefficient lead management causes missed rental opportunities. We provide streamlined marketing and lead management software instead of manual tracking and spreadsheets.
problem_solved: inefficient lead management and marketing processes
